contracts.error_handling_strategy: Idempotency keys for retries, exponential backoff for rate limits, log transaction to dead-letter queue

error_responses.description: Upstream payment gateway rejected the charge (e.g., declined card, insufficient funds).
error_responses.action: Notify user via UI/Email with retry option or cancel order.

error_responses.description: Request rejected due to excessive frequency (Stripe API threshold).
error_responses.action: Wait before retrying (e.g., 60s) and increment client-side retry counter.

contracts.data_format: JSON (Recipient List, Content Body, Template ID)
contracts.error_handling_strategy: Queue failed messages, throttle burst traffic, validate email format pre-send

error_responses.description: External provider rejected the message (invalid address or inbox full).
error_responses.action: Update status table, flag for manual review, do not retry immediately.

error_responses.description: Referenced email/SMS template ID does not exist in provider.
error_responses.action: Fallback to default static template or alert admin.

contracts.data_format: JSON (Entity Data, Document IDs, Notice Dates)
contracts.error_handling_strategy: Circuit breaker pattern, alert compliance officer if external lookup fails repeatedly

error_responses.description: Government API session token has lapsed.
error_responses.action: Refresh token via admin service or fallback to static rule set.

error_responses.description: External government endpoint timed out or returned 5xx.
error_responses.action: Retry with exponential backoff, log incident.

contracts.data_format: JSON (Prompt Context, CC&R Text, Output Structure)
contracts.error_handling_strategy: Request timeout handling, cache last valid response for non-real-time tasks, fallback to static rules

error_responses.action: Queue job and retry later, notify tenant of service degradation if persistent.

error_responses.description: Sent prompt JSON schema does not match AI provider requirements.
error_responses.action: Validate input schema before sending, sanitize text input.

contracts.error_handling_strategy: Local storage of failed uploads, background re-sync when connectivity restored

error_responses.description: Device has no network; queue action locally.
error_responses.action: Store in local SQLite/Realm, do not block UI, alert user when connection restored.

error_responses.description: Local queue for offline assets is at capacity.
error_responses.action: Delete oldest queued assets, notify user to free up space.

contracts.error_handling_strategy: Retry failed uploads with checksum verification, alert if storage quota hit

error_responses.description: Splats/Image file exceeds storage object limit (e.g., 5GB).
error_responses.action: Compress file, split into chunks, or reject with guidance.

error_responses.description: SeaweedFS cluster node failure or high load.
error_responses.action: Failover to secondary cluster if available, queue request for retry.
